title: Samsung aims to help you make more sense of health data with a new AI-powered assistant - Engadget
summary: This chatbot, which is fully integrated into Samsung Health, is now available in beta for "eligible US users." The aim with Health Assistant is to help folks gain a better understanding of what their health data means.
